allow: Bash(echo "=== which brew ===" && which brew 2>&1; echo "=== homebrew bins ===" && ls -la /opt/homebrew/bin/ 2>&1 | grep -iE "node|npm|pnpm|ffmpeg|docker|gh|psql|postgres|corepack" | head -40; echo "=== /usr/local/bin ===" && ls /usr/local/bin/ 2>&1 | grep -iE "node|npm|pnpm|ffmpeg|docker|gh|psql|postgres" | head -40)
